final:
module ring_counter (
    input rst_clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [4:0] count
);
    always @(posedge rst_clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 5'b00001;  // Initialize to "00001"
        end else begin
            count <= {count[3:0], count[4]};  // Shift left and wrap around
        end
    end
endmodule
